title: Famous temples of Madhya Pradesh!
description:
Madhya Pradesh boasts more than just Mahakaleshwar—Omkareshwar Temple sits on an ‘Om’-shaped island in the Narmada near Khandwa, alongside Mamleshwar.
Khajuraho features Kandariya Mahadev’s UNESCO carvings and Jain Adinath Temple; Ujjain has liquor-prasad Kal Bhairav, grand Bade Ganeshji, and Harsiddhi Shakti Peeth.
Jabalpur’s circular Chausath Yogini Temple offers stunning Narmada views—comment your favorite MP temple and follow for more!
